bull.b: Lineage has demonstrated reproducible two-tier banking and an FDA-cleared final product, with mathematical potential to produce millions of vials. bull.t: Multi-year Cash Runway Plus Contingent Funding
bull.b: Reported cash of $53.4M, potential ~$32M in warrants and eligibility for up to $615M in partner milestones create a multi‑year funding backdrop. bear.t: Persistent Cash Burn And Negative Operating Cash Flow
bear.b: Operating and free cash flows are materially negative on a trailing‑twelve‑month basis (about -$22M), reflecting ongoing R&D and scale-up spend. bear.t: Partner Dependence And Timing Uncertainty For OpRegen
bear.b: Progress and public timing for OpRegen are controlled largely by Roche/Genentech decisions and GAlette disclosures. bear.t: Islet Program Scale And Technical Complexity
bear.b: The islet (T1D) program faces enduring manufacturing hurdles: required doses near ~1 billion cells per patient and commercial production likely needs ~80L reactor scale.
